title: switch statements should include default clauses
description: "switch" statements should have "default" clausesAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smellcwebased-on-misracertWhy is this an issue?More InfoThe requirement for a finaldefaultclause is defensive programming. The clause should either take appropriate action, or contain a suitable comment as to why no action is taken. When theswitchcovers all current values of anenum- and especially when it doesn’t - adefaultcase should still be used because there is no guarantee that theenumwon’t be extended.Note that there is a more nuanced version of this rule:S3562.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Switch statement should include a default clause for defensive programming
